subject: docs(todo): rewrite per-repo gaps as step-by-step implementation guides
body:
Transformed flat gap lists into actionable step-by-step guides for all
11 repos. Each pattern section now includes: numbered implementation
steps, reference links to the relevant docs/implementations/*.md file,
confirmation/verification steps, and decision prompts for patterns
that may not be needed. 242 actionable items across 11 repos.

Tags: documentation, audit, patterns, implementation-guide
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: pattern-alignment
Semver: patch
